title: Lab Defaults
description: Smart defaults for the lab lifecycle wizard. Only include fields you want to override — missing fields are ignored.

groups.description: Group-based feature activation names (e.g. ["GHCPUsers"]). Each group provisions a feature for the created Entra ID users.

labsPerSubscription.description: Number of lab environments to pack per Azure subscription.

preferredLocation.description: Comma-separated list of preferred Azure regions, in priority order (e.g. "swedencentral, norwayeast").

estimatedDailyCostsUsd.description: Estimated daily cost per lab environment in USD. Used for cost forecasting in the lab lifecycle wizard.
